pulse: The Technology sector currently trades at a median EV/EBITDA of 16.1x and P/E of 23.1x, compared to the S&P 500's forward P/E of 21.6x, suggesting a premium valuation relative to both the broader market and its 12.2% revenue growth profile. Notably, NVIDIA (NVDA) exhibits the highest multiples with an EV/EBITDA of 31.9x and P/E of 36.1x, while HP Inc. (HPQ) trades at a steep discount with an EV/EBITDA of 5.6x and trailing P/E of 7.2x, highlighting a significant valuation spread within the sector.
